lucid:
🎉 **Congratulations on winning a free {size} {account_type} account from Lucid Trading!!**

Please read the instructions below and reply in this ticket once you've completed the required steps.

1) Please fill out the form ASAP. If you are already trading with them, use the email address you have registered with them.
If it's your first time trying them out, fill out the form with the email address you are going to use with them in step 3:
https://www.maxoptionstrading.com/giveaway-claim-mot-9f7a2c13

2) Let us know when you have filled out the form and we will provide you a code to get the free account.

3) Go to Lucid Trading website and start a new eval (register if it's your first time with them), select the **{size} Lucid {account_type}** account and use the code provided in checkout. Make sure the total says **$0** before you complete the purchase.

4) Once activated the account, please take a screenshot of the account and post an appreciation post in:
https://discord.com/channels/670766551137386515/1295861535238783006

{tag_line}

**The double up program is not applicable for large giveaways and S2F/Direct accounts.**

indicator:
🎉 **Congrats on winning a free indicator for a {duration}!**

Please read the instructions below and reply in this ticket once you've completed the required steps.

**Step 1)** Fill out this form:
https://www.maxoptionstrading.com/giveaway-claim-mot-9f7a2c13

**Step 2)** Go to:
https://www.maxoptionstrading.com/indicators
and select the indicator you want to try out.

**Step 3)** Let us know when you have completed step 1 and 2 and we will provide you with a discount code.

---

### Instructions on how to claim it:

**1)** Log on to your profile at:
www.maxoptionstrading.com
via computer or phone.

**2)** Go to *Dashboard* and link your **TradingView** and **Discord** account to your profile.

This will give you access to:
- the indicator on TradingView
- the private channel for the indicator on Discord

**3)** In a separate tab, log on to TradingView:
- open any chart
- click *Indicators*
- go to *Invite-only*

You'll see the indicator there.

If you can't see it immediately:
- refresh your tab by hitting **F5**
- or use the refresh symbol

If that doesn't help, log out of TradingView and log back in, then check again.

---

⚠️ The subscription will automatically renew after the free trial. If you do not wish to continue, please cancel before the trial ends.
